2605.25163.title: K-U-KAN: Koopman-Enhanced U-KAN for 3D Dental Reconstruction from a Single Panoramic X-ray Radiograph
2605.25163.paper_summary: A panoramic X-ray compresses a 3D jaw into a 2D strip; we aim to recover the missing depth cleanly and fast. Existing implicit neural representations render realistic volumes but are slow to train, sensitive to sampling and positional encodings, and costly in practice. Pure CNN baselines are efficient yet struggle with the dental arch's long-range geometry, blur fine enamel-dentin boundaries, and offer little interpretability. We present K-U-KAN, a three-stage pipeline that (i) lifts 2D features into depth-aware observables with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks, (ii) advances these observables by a stable, phase-aware linear evolution via a Koopman token block, and (iii) places the predicted depth bins onto focal-trough rays before a lightweight 3D attention U-KAN refines the volume. This marriage of physics (Beer-Lambert image formation), geometry (horseshoe focal trough), and learned linear dynamics yields sharp anatomy, fewer artifacts, and robust behavior on native radiographic intensities with batch size one. On held-out data, K-U-KAN matches transformer/implicit baselines on signal and structure metrics, clearly improves perceptual quality, and trains in roughly half the time-making single-view PX $\to$ CBCT reconstruction more practical for clinical pipelines.
2605.25163.paper_summary_zh: 全景X光將三維下頜壓縮為二維條帶；我們的目標是快速且乾淨地恢復缺失的深度。現有的隱式神經表示能夠渲染現實的體積，但訓練速度較慢，對採樣和位置編碼敏感，且在實踐中成本高昂。純CNN基線雖然高效，但在牙弓的長距離幾何形狀上表現不佳，模糊了精細的琺瑯質-牙本質邊界，且可解釋性有限。我們提出K-U-KAN，一個三階段的流程，(i) 使用Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks將二維特徵提升為深度感知的可觀測量，(ii) 通過Koopman token block以穩定的相位感知線性演化推進這些可觀測量，(iii) 將預測的深度區間放置於焦點槽光線上，然後由輕量級的3D注意力U-KAN對體積進行細化。這種物理（Beer-Lambert影像形成）、幾何（馬蹄形焦點槽）和學習的線性動力學的結合產生了清晰的解剖結構、更少的伪影，並在原生放射強度下以批量大小為一時表現穩健。在保留的數據上，K-U-KAN在信號和結構指標上與Transformer/隱式基線相匹配，顯著提高了感知質量，並在大約一半的時間內完成訓練，使單視圖PX $\to$ CBCT重建對臨床流程更具實用性。
2605.25163.author: Bikram Keshari Parida et.al.
2605.25163.authors: Bikram Keshari Parida, Abhijit Sen, Wonsang You
